description: API Setu is an API marketplace and gateway operated by the Government of India for publishing and consuming APIs across government and private-sector organizations. It is used for document verification, DigiLocker integrations, and other interoperable service exchanges.
summary: apisetu.gov.in exposes HTTP APIs for document/certificate verification and DigiLocker issuer integration; public docs describe partner signup and issuance of API credentials, but no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
